## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress on Webflow's developer enablement initiatives and align on future plans for code components and marketplace integration.](https://fathom.video/share/CSKEzP6h4_9TbZMGf85kvRvgXq8aZmvy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shifting focus from SEO content to developer enablement, particularly code components and React apps](https://fathom.video/share/CSKEzP6h4_9TbZMGf85kvRvgXq8aZmvy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Aiming for 30 code components by Halloween, with at least 10 being "materially interesting"](https://fathom.video/share/CSKEzP6h4_9TbZMGf85kvRvgXq8aZmvy?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide timeline estimates for deliverables across different workstreams (integrations, guides, components)](https://fathom.video/share/CSKEzP6h4_9TbZMGf85kvRvgXq8aZmvy?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
  - [Webflow planning a marketplace for components, including both native Webflow and code-based options](https://fathom.video/share/CSKEzP6h4_9TbZMGf85kvRvgXq8aZmvy?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)

## Topics

### Integration and Guide Progress

  - [Published multiple integrations, targeting 20-30 per week](https://fathom.video/share/CSKEzP6h4_9TbZMGf85kvRvgXq8aZmvy?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Working on workflow to generate integration guides more efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/CSKEzP6h4_9TbZMGf85kvRvgXq8aZmvy?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [SEO articles progressing well, with some brand guideline adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/CSKEzP6h4_9TbZMGf85kvRvgXq8aZmvy?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)

### Code Components Vision

  - [Focus on generating raw code snippets for functional components](https://fathom.video/share/CSKEzP6h4_9TbZMGf85kvRvgXq8aZmvy?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [Components will eventually be listed individually in Webflow Marketplace](https://fathom.video/share/CSKEzP6h4_9TbZMGf85kvRvgXq8aZmvy?tab=summary&timestamp=419.0)
  - [Aiming for flexibility and creativity beyond basic UI elements (e.g., "glassy button")](https://fathom.video/share/CSKEzP6h4_9TbZMGf85kvRvgXq8aZmvy?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [Future potential to include React apps with backend functionality](https://fathom.video/share/CSKEzP6h4_9TbZMGf85kvRvgXq8aZmvy?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)

### Marketplace Integration

  - [Planning to break up existing component libraries into individual, searchable listings](https://fathom.video/share/CSKEzP6h4_9TbZMGf85kvRvgXq8aZmvy?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Will include both native Webflow components and code-based options](https://fathom.video/share/CSKEzP6h4_9TbZMGf85kvRvgXq8aZmvy?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [Long-term goal: surfacing components directly in Webflow designer](https://fathom.video/share/CSKEzP6h4_9TbZMGf85kvRvgXq8aZmvy?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)

### Resource Allocation

  - [Prioritizing integration pages and use cases as evergreen content](https://fathom.video/share/CSKEzP6h4_9TbZMGf85kvRvgXq8aZmvy?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
  - [Considering reallocating resources from SEO to generative work for components and apps](https://fathom.video/share/CSKEzP6h4_9TbZMGf85kvRvgXq8aZmvy?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
  - [GrowthX to assess current capacity and provide timeline estimates](https://fathom.video/share/CSKEzP6h4_9TbZMGf85kvRvgXq8aZmvy?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)

### Project Timeline and Expectations

  - [No firm deadline for marketplace launch (expected in "months")](https://fathom.video/share/CSKEzP6h4_9TbZMGf85kvRvgXq8aZmvy?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [Interim solution: DevRel team to showcase components through developers subdomain or GitHub](https://fathom.video/share/CSKEzP6h4_9TbZMGf85kvRvgXq8aZmvy?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
  - [Targeting 30 components (10 "materially interesting") by Halloween, but flexible based on difficulty](https://fathom.video/share/CSKEzP6h4_9TbZMGf85kvRvgXq8aZmvy?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to conduct proof of concept for a few simple components (e.g., button, table)](https://fathom.video/share/CSKEzP6h4_9TbZMGf85kvRvgXq8aZmvy?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide timeline estimates for deliverables early next week](https://fathom.video/share/CSKEzP6h4_9TbZMGf85kvRvgXq8aZmvy?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
  - [Reschedule next week's meeting due to DevRel team offsite](https://fathom.video/share/CSKEzP6h4_9TbZMGf85kvRvgXq8aZmvy?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [Colin to identify potential meeting slot for Wednesday evening or following week](https://fathom.video/share/CSKEzP6h4_9TbZMGf85kvRvgXq8aZmvy?tab=summary&timestamp=1605.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue integration and guide work while ramping up component development](https://fathom.video/share/CSKEzP6h4_9TbZMGf85kvRvgXq8aZmvy?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
